items.title: Designing Trust into AI Products
items.description: How product teams can bake transparency, evaluation, and human oversight into AI-powered experiences from day one.

items.title: Cloud-Native Platforms for Modern Teams
items.description: A pragmatic look at platform engineering — golden paths, internal developer portals, and the metrics that actually matter.

items.title: From Prototype to Production with LLMs
items.description: Hands-on workshop covering retrieval, evaluation harnesses, guardrails, and cost-aware deployment for generative AI features.

items.title: Mentoring in Tech: Building People, Not Just Products
items.description: Panel discussion on structured mentorship programs, sponsor vs. mentor distinctions, and growing engineering leaders.

items.title: Securing Payment APIs at Scale
items.description: Threat modeling, tokenization, and zero-trust patterns for high-volume payment platforms.

items.title: Resilient Kubernetes for Peak Traffic
items.description: Real-world patterns for HPA tuning, multi-AZ failover, and graceful degradation under unpredictable load.
